arts.ttl: Spurs fined £20,000 over scuffle in West Ham game
arts.sum: Tottenham are fined £20,000 by the Football Association after accepting a charge of failing to control their players against West Ham.

arts.ttl: Jay-Z business partner names Premier League club he likes amid Tottenham takeover link
Dragusin’s agent discusses Napoli Interest and Tottenham commitment
arts.sum: Florin Manea, the agent of Radu Dragusin, recently spoke in an exclusive interview with Gonfialarete.com about his client’s situation and the rumored interest from Napoli. The Romanian defender, currently with Tottenham Hotspur, has been the subject of speculation regarding a potential move to the Italian club. When asked about the renewed interest from Napoli, Manea clarified, “I haven’t spoken to anyone, and I don’t believe Tottenham wants to let him go. Radu is focused and wants to seize his opportunities with the Spurs. I’ve seen the news, but—I repeat—I haven’t heard from anyone. arts.ttl: Maddison and Moore start, Werner call in Spurs team Postecoglou must pick vs AZ
arts.sum: Guest's team: Vicario; Porro, Dragusin, Van de Ven, Gray; Bentancur, Sarr, Maddison; Moore, Richarlison, Werner. Wilmot's team: Vicario; Porro, Romero, Dragusin, Davies; Gray, Sarr, Maddison; Johnson, Richarlison, Moore.

arts.ttl: Odobert returns, no Son, Sarr wrestling and things spotted in Spurs training
arts.sum: Son Heung-min was a notable absentee in the open training session at Hotspur Way. Following a recent spell on the sidelines due to a hamstring injury picked up in the game against Qarabag, the Tottenham captain made his return in last weekend's home win over West Ham. Tottenham have been handed a boost on the injury front going into Thursday's Europa League tie against AZ Alkmaar following Wilson Odobert's return to training.
